title: Curios Containers
description: A Small QoL (Quality of Life) Mod that adds Backpack(s) to your Minecraft world!
body:
Curios Containers is a small backpack/bauble mod designed to enhance your Minecraft experience.
With the power of Curios API, this mod introduces a new backpack feature into the game. In this early version (0.7), players can enjoy the convenience of 3 basic means of storage.

As I continue to develop this mod, stay tuned for upcoming updates and expansions. My future plans include adding more diverse backpack options and features to enrich your gameplay.

# Features:
Introduces a backpack feature using the Curios API.
Early development version with one basic backpack.
Future updates planned for expanded backpack options and features.

# Requirements:
**Minecraft version 1.20.1** (More to be added soon)

**Curios API.**
